name: World Tango Day
traditions: Milongas (dance events); tango concerts; street performances; tango history exhibitions; Carlos Gardel tributes.
historicalBackground: World Tango Day falls on the birthday of Carlos Gardel, tango's most iconic singer, and coincides with tango composer Julio de Caro's birthday.
description: The global celebration of tango on Carlos Gardel's birthday, with milongas and performances honoring Argentina's most passionate art form.
